text: Still hitting 503 from the payment provider SDK. Opened a support ticket but no ETA yet. This is blocking DEMO-102 and DEMO-110.
The race condition fix is trickier than expected. Need to refactor the session store to use atomic operations. Might take another day.
Can't start load testing until the payment endpoint is stable. Currently blocked on Bob's PR #237.
Rate limiter PR is up for review. No blockers on my end but waiting for someone to review PR #241.
Staging pipeline is green. But deployment to production is gated until payment integration is merged and tested.
PR #237 has merge conflicts after Alice's OAuth changes were merged. Need to rebase and fix the integration tests.
Standup: OAuth is merged! Moving to the session race condition bug. Estimated 2-3 days.
Reminder: we have zero test coverage on the payment flow right now. Risk of regressions is high if we rush.
Webhook processor is almost done. Should be merged today. Then starting rate limiting.
Sprint ends today and we still have 2 blocked items. Might need to carry over DEMO-106 and DEMO-110 to next sprint.
